_meta.purpose: Ground-truth QC eval set — Fable-audited BR product-card renders. Run the QC judge against this before any paid batch; a judge that misranks these is unfit.
_meta.source: session Fable vision audit of the BR re-run
_meta.colorway_resolved: 2026-06-12 Fable workflow: greyscale confirmed br-001/002/004/005/006; br-007 side-panel green (minor).
_meta.correction_2026_06_12: br-006 flipped FAIL->PASS after direct pixel re-audit: the fixture render DOES show black sherpa/fleece lining inside the hood opening (plus ribbed cuffs, satin shell, greyscale cluster on wearer's left chest) matching the real garment. The earlier 'sherpa lining absent / plain satin bomber' reason is contradicted by the file. Supersedes the br-006 row in validation-2026-06-12.json, which scored judges against the wrong label.

labels.fable_reason: Fable: two-rose cluster correct (not peony), black crewneck + white ringer, correct placement; only painterly-vs-embroidered style diff. Shippable.
Fable: garment+color+silhouette+logo art+placement all match real photo. Shippable.
Fable: JUSTIFIED-FAIL — body is black, real garment is forest green; branding placement mirrored. Wrong colorway.

Fable pixel re-audit 2026-06-12: sherpa IS present — black fleece lining clearly visible inside the hood opening; satin shell, ribbed knit cuffs/hem, snap placket, greyscale three-rose cluster on wearer's left chest all match the real garment (real has sherpa in hood only; cuffs are ribbed knit, not sherpa). Earlier 'sherpa absent / plain satin bomber' label was wrong. Shippable.
Fable colorway-truth: real garment logo is GREYSCALE (no green); greyscale render matches -> shippable. (Resolves the earlier dossier/judge green-vs-grey conflict.)

Fable colorway-truth: allover print greyscale (correct); left mesh side-panel patch has a real green stem the render renders grey -> minor colorway miss on a small patch, still shippable per Fable audit. Dossier "NO green" override is wrong for this placement.
